title: Integration Tests, Daemon Hardening, Auto-Store on Deep Queries

test_results.notes: 32 skipped = new integration tests guarded by OCTANE_TEST_INTEGRATION=1 / OCTANE_TEST_E2E=1

A.title: Integration Tests Against Live Infrastructure

guards.OCTANE_TEST_E2E: Also enables Bodega live inference tests

test_classes: TestPostgresConnectivity — connect, schema tables, columns, idempotency
TestWebPageStore — store, dedup, seen, recent, count
TestBodegaRouterLive (E2E) — health, tier routing, inference returns text
TestOSAPipelineLive (E2E) — health command, ask response, memory store+recall
TestAutoStoreOnDeepQuery (E2E) — router.pg connected, web_pages count increases
TestDatabaseSchema — tables, columns, research_findings created on demand

B.title: Daemon Multi-Terminal Contention Fix
B.root_cause: ensure_loaded() had a TOCTOU race: check get_model(), then _load_model() with no lock between. Two concurrent callers both saw existing=None and both invoked _load_model() simultaneously → double-load race condition against Bodega.

fix.mechanism: Per-model asyncio.Lock stored in self._model_locks dict, lazily created by _lock(model_id) helper
functions_locked: ensure_loaded() — wraps entire check-then-load in async with self._lock(model_id)
_unload_model() — wraps entire unload in async with self._lock(model_id) to prevent load-while-unloading race
fix.topology_risk: compact and balanced topologies auto-unload REASON tier after 2-5 min idle; without lock, high concurrency terminals reliably triggered the race

C.title: Auto-Store on --deep Queries
C.root_cause: Router.__init__ created self.pg = PgClient() but never called connect(). PgClient.available = False by default. WebPageStore.store() checks `if not self.available: return None`. All web page persistence silently no-oped.
C.fix_orchestrator: _connect_memory_pg() now also calls await self.router.pg.connect() with graceful except/warning on failure
C.fix_ask: Added _store_deep_finding() async helper + fire-and-forget asyncio.ensure_future() call after --deep output completes. Persists synthesis result to research_findings table via ResearchStore.

MCP_server.reason: Premature brand dilution. Octane becomes a feature of VS Code / Claude Desktop instead of a product in its own right. Does not serve target users (hedge fund analysts, lawyers). Creates Anthropic protocol dependency.
MCP_server.user_quote: The pitch is seductive but premature... Octane becomes a feature of their product instead of a product in its own right.

architecture_notes.persistence_chain: Orchestrator._connect_memory_pg() → Router.pg.connect() + MemoryAgent.connect_pg() → WebPageStore/ArtifactStore become active
architecture_notes.model_lifecycle: ModelManager._lock(model_id) → asyncio.Lock per model → ensure_loaded + _unload_model both hold lock → zero double-load races
architecture_notes.research_store: ResearchStore uses its own separate asyncpg connection (lazy), independent of Router.pg
